have h₁ : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
    have h₂ : ∀ (n : ℕ), iIndepFun (fun p : α × ℕ => if n = 0 then (rewardByCount p.1 n : ℝ) else 0) 𝔓 := by
      intro n
      apply iIndepFun_ae_eq
      · apply iIndepFun.const_right
        <;> simp
      · -- We need to show that the function is almost everywhere equal to Zero
        -- This is trivially true because the function is zero for all n ≠ 0
        filter_upwards [ae_restrict_all 𝔓 (by simp)] with ω
        split_ifs <;> simp_all
        <;> aesop
      <;> try simp_all [ae_restrict_all]
      <;> try aesop
    have h₃ : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
      -- Use the fact that the sum of iIndepFun functions is iIndepFun
      have h₄ : ∀ (n : ℕ), iIndepFun (fun p : α × ℕ => if n = 0 then (rewardByCount p.1 n : ℝ) else 0) 𝔓 := h₂
      have h₅ : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
        -- We need to show that the function rewardByCount is iIndepFun
        -- This follows from the fact that each term in the sum is iIndepFun
        have h₆ : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) 𝔓 := by
          -- Use the fact that the sum of iIndepFun functions is iIndepFun
          apply iIndepFun.summable_nat
          -- Show that the sum is summable
          <;> simp_all [summable_of_ne_finset_zero]
          <;> try aesop
          <;> try norm_num
          <;> try
            {
              intro n
              have h₇ := h₂ n
              simp_all [iIndepFun]
              <;> aesop
            }
          <;> try
            {
              have h₇ := h₂ 0
              simp_all [iIndepFun]
              <;> aesop
            }
          <;> try
            {
              have h₇ := h₂ 1
              simp_all [iIndepFun]
              <;> aesop
            }
          <;> try
            {
              have h₇ := h₂ 2
              simp_all [iIndepFun]
              <;> aesop
            }
        exact h₆
      exact h₅
    exact h₃
  exact h₁

have h₁ : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) (Bandit.measure alg ν) := by
    mk
    intro n
    have h₂ : ∀ (a : α) (k : ℕ), k ≠ 0 → rewardByCount a k = reward (k - 1) := by
      intro a k hk
      simp [rewardByCount, pullCount_pos, Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero, Nat.sub_pos_of_lt]
      <;> cases k with
      | zero =>
        simp_all
      | succ k =>
        simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
        <;> rfl
    have h₃ : (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) ∘ (fun ω => (a, n+1)) = fun ω => reward n := by
      ext ω
      simp_all [h₂, Nat.succ_ne_zero]
      <;> cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
      <;> rfl
    have h₄ : (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) ∘ (fun ω => (a, n+1)) ⊢ (fun ω => reward n) := by
      simp_all [h₃]
      <;> rfl
    have h₅ : (fun ω => reward n) ⊢ (fun ω => reward n) := by
      apply IIndepFun.indepFun
      <;> try simp_all [funext_iff]
      <;> intro i
      <;> cases i <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
      <;> rfl
    have h₆ : (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) ∘ (fun ω => (a, n+1)) ⊢ (fun ω => reward n) := by
      simp_all [h₃]
      <;> rfl
    have h₇ : ∀ (n : ℕ), (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) ∘ (fun ω => (a, n+1)) ⊢ (fun ω => reward n) := by
      intro n
      ext ω
      simp_all [h₂, Nat.succ_ne_zero]
      <;> cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
      <;> rfl
    have h₈ : iIndepFun (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) (Bandit.measure alg ν) := by
      refine' ⟨fun i j => ?_, ?_⟩
      · -- Prove the independence property
        cases i <;> cases j <;> simp_all [h₂, Nat.succ_ne_zero]
        <;> try norm_num
        <;> try omega
        <;> try simp_all [rewardByCount, pullCount_pos, Nat.pos_iff_ne_zero, Nat.sub_pos_of_lt]
        <;> try cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
        <;> try rfl
      · -- Prove the measurability property
        intro n
        have h₉ : (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) ∘ (fun ω => (a, n+1)) = (fun ω => reward n) := by
          ext ω
          simp_all [h₂, Nat.succ_ne_zero]
          <;> cases n <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
          <;> rfl
        have h₁₀ : (fun (p : α × ℕ) ↦ rewardByCount p.1 p.2) ∘ (fun ω => (a, n+1)) ⊢ (fun ω => reward n) := by
          simp_all [h₃]
          <;> rfl
        have h₁₁ : (fun ω => reward n) ⊢ (fun ω => reward n) := by
          apply IIndepFun.indepFun
          <;> try simp_all [funext_iff]
          <;> intro i
          <;> cases i <;> simp_all [Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_assoc]
          <;> rfl
        simp_all [h₃]
        <;> aesop
    exact h₈
  exact h₁
